subcodes.first_line: O Husayn! Upon thee be the glory of God, the Lord of the mighty Throne. Mention of thee hath been made in the presence of the Wronged One, and that honoured one [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا حسین علیک بهاء الله رب العرش العظیم ذکر شما در ساحت مظلوم بوده و جناب
subcodes.subjects: @the power of words; of speech, @suffering and imprisonment, @service to others; to the Cause of God
